intro: Praravinia havilandii, also known as the Haviland's praravinia, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, classified within the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Praravinia havilandii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its pharmacological activities.
